$updated: USER TEMPLATE — run the setup-wizard to fill your own values
$description: Shared configuration this kit's skills read at runtime. Edit here, not inline in scripts.

adapters.$note: 3 yes/no switches the setup wizard sets from plain questions (see references/adapters.md). In this kit they control ONLY what your two live tiles display — 'yes' shows the fuller journey/label, 'no' shows a clean honest version. Nothing breaks either way. Automating your prep center or SellerBoard is a later lesson, not this kit.

live_artifact_feeds.$note: Your three live tiles each read a small JSON feed from your own Drive. scripts/create_feed_files.py creates all three files and fills the ids below during setup (Step 7b) — nothing to edit here by hand.

cogs.$note: pre_bought_asins = ASINs that already carry cost history in SellerBoard from before you started using this kit. Leave empty if you have none.
